chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2038 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Miran Muhammad Shah For hearing of bail application 27.10.2025 Mr. Ajab Khan Khattak Advocate for the Applicants Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-. OMAR SIAL, J.- Chand Bibi D/o Lal Wazir Khan sought post-arrest bail in crime number 273 of 2024 registered under sections 6/9(I) 3(E) of CNS (Amendment) Act, 2022 at Police Station Mochko. Her earlier bail plea was dismissed vide order dated 18.06.2025 by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Karachi West. 2. A Police Party led by SIP Ayub Mirani was on patrol duty when it received spy information on 09.08.2024 at 1300 hours that a large consignment of narcotics is being transported from Quetta to Karachi. The police party stopped the identified vehicle which was being driven by Nazeer Ahmed while Naseem Shah and Umer Ali apart from two ladies Chand Bibi and Haleema were the occupants of the car, when the car was searched 24 Kgs of charas was recovered from boot of the car. 3. We have heard the learned counsel for the Applicant and the leered Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. 4. We have been informed that the co-accused Haleema was granted bail vide Order dated 23.07.2025 by this Court in Bail Application No. 1666 of 2025. Applicant Chand Bibi was neither the driver nor owner of the vehicle and also is entitled to the grant of bail on the ground of consistency. Accordingly the Applicant Chand Bibi is admitted to bail subject to furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.500,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court.

Applicant Chand Bibi was neither the driver nor owner of the vehicle and also is entitled to the grant of bail on the ground of consistency. Accordingly the Applicant Chand Bibi is admitted to bail subject to furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.500,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
